message:
test(beads): improve internal/beads coverage from 55.5% to 88.3%

Add comprehensive unit tests for previously uncovered functions:
- fingerprint.go: canonicalizeGitURL, ComputeRepoID, GetCloneID
- beads.go: findDatabaseInBeadsDir, GetConfiguredBackend, FindAllDatabases,
  NewSQLiteStorage, findLocalBeadsDir, checkRedirectInDir
- context.go: GitCmdCWD, RelPath

Closes bd-tvu3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
